info.name: re-content-backend
info.description: Comprehensive API test collection for the re-content-backend Spring Boot service.

description.content: Application-level health checks.
Public health endpoint exposed by `HealthController`.
Authentication and token lifecycle. Register/login also return a `Set-Cookie` refresh token.
Creates a new user. Pre-request script generates unique email/username and stores auth variables (ccessToken, efreshToken, userId).
Logs in with email or username (`login` field) and refreshes auth variables.
Stores admin bearer token in `adminAccessToken`. Requires an existing ADMIN user.

exec: pm.test('Admin login status is success', function () {

description.content: Uses `refresh_token` cookie (or explicit Cookie header) and rotates both refresh/access token.
Returns auth envelope with current user under `user` field.
Revokes refresh token and clears auth variables.
Negative test for validation contract. Expected `400` + `VALIDATION_ERROR`.
User profile operations for authenticated user.
Returns `UserResponse` payload.
Optional profile fields, max lengths enforced server-side.
Favorites are upserted by `user + mediaType + mediaId`.
Lists current user's favorites ordered by latest creation.
Supports aliases `id`, `poster_path`, `backdrop_path`, `release_date`, `vote_average`.
Deletes favorite by path variables `mediaType` and `mediaId`.
Watchlist supports statuses: `planned`, `watching`, `completed`, `dropped`.
Returns watchlist items ordered by `updatedAt` descending.
Upserts item by media reference; captures `watchlistItemId`.
Validates status enum.
Deletes current user's watchlist item by UUID.
Ratings are upserted by media reference. Score range: 0.5 to 10.0.
Lists current user's ratings.
Creates or updates rating and stores `ratingId`.
Updates score for existing rating.
Deletes rating by UUID.
Negative validation case for score upper bound.
Public listing endpoint plus authenticated write/update/delete flows.
Public endpoint. Lists reviews by media type and media id.
Creates a review and stores `reviewId`.
Allowed for review owner or ADMIN.
Deletes review. Owner or admin only.
Plan listing is public. Subscription and current membership require auth.
Public endpoint. Stores first plan id into `membershipPlanId`.
Subscribes current user to selected plan UUID.
Returns active membership or `null`.
All endpoints require `ADMIN` role. Use `adminAccessToken`.
Lists all users and role sets.
Paged audit logs. Size is capped to 100 by backend.
Aggregated counts for users and domain tables.
Expected `403 FORBIDDEN` for non-admin users.
Public actuator endpoints enabled by configuration.
Actuator health endpoint.
Actuator info endpoint.
